ANONYMOUS.name: adjust_ui
ANONYMOUS.description: Adjust the UI appearance for accessibility, comfort, or user preference. Supports named presets and individual property overrides.

ANONYMOUS.name: calculator
ANONYMOUS.description: Performs arithmetic. Mandatory for every math calculation.

ANONYMOUS.name: generate_chart
ANONYMOUS.description: Generate a visual Mermaid.js chart. Prefer the structured spec for common chart families like flowcharts, pie charts, quadrants, xy charts, and mindmaps.

ANONYMOUS.name: generate_graph
ANONYMOUS.description: Generate a quantitative graph or data table for time-series, comparisons, distributions, or trend visualizations.

ANONYMOUS.name: get_corpus_summary
ANONYMOUS.description: Return a structured summary of the knowledge corpus including document count and top-level topics.

ANONYMOUS.name: get_current_page
ANONYMOUS.description: Return authoritative information about the page the user is currently viewing.

ANONYMOUS.name: get_section
ANONYMOUS.description: Retrieve structured full content, canonical metadata, and related sections for a specific corpus section.

ANONYMOUS.name: inspect_runtime_context
ANONYMOUS.description: Inspect the current role-scoped runtime context for truthful meta answers about available capabilities.

ANONYMOUS.name: inspect_theme
ANONYMOUS.description: Inspect the active theme configuration and return machine-readable design tokens.

ANONYMOUS.name: list_available_pages
ANONYMOUS.description: List all pages the current user can access based on their role.

ANONYMOUS.name: list_practitioners
ANONYMOUS.description: List key practitioners referenced in the series.

ANONYMOUS.name: navigate_to_page
ANONYMOUS.description: Navigate the user to a validated page. Dispatches the destination to the client router.

ANONYMOUS.name: search_corpus
ANONYMOUS.description: Search across all 11 books (93 chapters) in the Second Renaissance Knowledge System.

ADMIN.name: adjust_ui
ADMIN.description: Adjust the UI appearance for accessibility, comfort, or user preference. Supports named presets and individual property overrides.

ADMIN.name: admin_prioritize_leads
ADMIN.description: Retrieve and prioritize the current lead queue for administrative triage and follow-up.

ADMIN.name: admin_prioritize_offer
ADMIN.description: Analyze a lead's profile and recommend a tailored service offer from the available packages.

ADMIN.name: admin_search
ADMIN.description: Search across users, conversations, leads, and referrals for administrative lookups.

ADMIN.name: admin_triage_routing_risk
ADMIN.description: Analyze routing risk signals and recommend triage actions for conversations with uncertain intent.

ADMIN.name: admin_web_search
ADMIN.description: Search the live web using OpenAI and return a sourced answer with citations. Use allowed_domains to target specific sites (e.g. en.wikipedia.org for Wikipedia searches). Admin only.

ADMIN.name: approve_journal_post
ADMIN.description: Approve a journal post for publication after editorial review.

ADMIN.name: calculator
ADMIN.description: Performs arithmetic. Mandatory for every math calculation.

ADMIN.name: compose_blog_article
ADMIN.description: Compose the first editorial article draft from a brief.

ADMIN.name: compose_media
ADMIN.description: Compose, trim, and combine visual and audio assets into a new MP4 video. Produces a unified artifact. You must provide governed asset handles.

ADMIN.name: draft_content
ADMIN.description: Draft a journal article as structured markdown. Use markdown headings, lists, links, quotes, tables, or fenced code blocks as appropriate. Do not repeat the title inside the content body. The article is saved as a draft that must be explicitly published by an admin.

ADMIN.name: generate_audio
ADMIN.description: Generate in-chat audio player.

ADMIN.name: generate_blog_image
ADMIN.description: Generate the editorial hero image asset for a prepared article.

ADMIN.name: generate_blog_image_prompt
ADMIN.description: Design the editorial hero-image prompt and related metadata for a finished article.

ADMIN.name: generate_chart
ADMIN.description: Generate a visual Mermaid.js chart. Prefer the structured spec for common chart families like flowcharts, pie charts, quadrants, xy charts, and mindmaps.

ADMIN.name: generate_graph
ADMIN.description: Generate a quantitative graph or data table for time-series, comparisons, distributions, or trend visualizations.

ADMIN.name: get_admin_affiliate_summary
ADMIN.description: Retrieve the system-wide affiliate analytics dashboard for administrative review.

ADMIN.name: get_checklist
ADMIN.description: Get chapter checklists.

ADMIN.name: get_corpus_summary
ADMIN.description: Return a structured summary of the knowledge corpus including document count and top-level topics.

ADMIN.name: get_current_page
ADMIN.description: Return authoritative information about the page the user is currently viewing.

ADMIN.name: get_deferred_job_status
ADMIN.description: Get the status of a specific deferred job by conversation context. Admin only.

ADMIN.name: get_journal_post
ADMIN.description: Retrieve a specific journal post by ID with full content and metadata.

ADMIN.name: get_journal_workflow_summary
ADMIN.description: Get a summary of the editorial workflow state for a journal post including active jobs and blockers.

ADMIN.name: get_my_affiliate_summary
ADMIN.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's affiliate performance summary including referrals and conversion metrics.

ADMIN.name: get_my_job_status
ADMIN.description: Get the status of a specific deferred job belonging to the current user.

ADMIN.name: get_my_profile
ADMIN.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile including name, roles, and referral info.

ADMIN.name: get_my_referral_qr
ADMIN.description: Generate and return the authenticated user's referral QR code image URL and shareable link.

ADMIN.name: get_section
ADMIN.description: Retrieve structured full content, canonical metadata, and related sections for a specific corpus section.

ADMIN.name: inspect_runtime_context
ADMIN.description: Inspect the current role-scoped runtime context for truthful meta answers about available capabilities.

ADMIN.name: inspect_theme
ADMIN.description: Inspect the active theme configuration and return machine-readable design tokens.

ADMIN.name: list_admin_referral_exceptions
ADMIN.description: List referral entries that require administrative review due to anomalies or policy exceptions.

ADMIN.name: list_available_pages
ADMIN.description: List all pages the current user can access based on their role.

ADMIN.name: list_deferred_jobs
ADMIN.description: List all deferred jobs for the current conversation with status and progress. Admin only.

ADMIN.name: list_journal_posts
ADMIN.description: List journal posts with optional status and category filters.

ADMIN.name: list_journal_revisions
ADMIN.description: List all editorial revisions for a specific journal post.

ADMIN.name: list_my_jobs
ADMIN.description: List all deferred jobs belonging to the current user with status and progress.

ADMIN.name: list_my_referral_activity
ADMIN.description: List the authenticated user's recent referral activity feed with status updates.

ADMIN.name: list_practitioners
ADMIN.description: List key practitioners referenced in the series.

ADMIN.name: navigate_to_page
ADMIN.description: Navigate the user to a validated page. Dispatches the destination to the client router.

ADMIN.name: prepare_journal_post_for_publish
ADMIN.description: Check whether a journal post is ready to publish and summarize blockers, active work, and QA findings.

ADMIN.name: produce_blog_article
ADMIN.description: Run the full editorial production pipeline from composition through draft persistence.

ADMIN.name: publish_content
ADMIN.description: Publish a draft journal article, making it publicly visible in the journal. Accepts either the post ID or the article slug.

ADMIN.name: publish_journal_post
ADMIN.description: Publish an approved journal post, making it publicly visible.

ADMIN.name: qa_blog_article
ADMIN.description: Run editorial QA against the current article draft and return structured findings.

ADMIN.name: resolve_blog_article_qa
ADMIN.description: Apply editorial fixes from a normalized QA report to the current article draft.

ADMIN.name: restore_journal_revision
ADMIN.description: Restore a previous editorial revision as the active draft content.

ADMIN.name: search_corpus
ADMIN.description: Search across all 11 books (93 chapters) in the Second Renaissance Knowledge System.

ADMIN.name: search_my_conversations
ADMIN.description: Search your own conversation history to recall past discussions.

ADMIN.name: select_journal_hero_image
ADMIN.description: Select or change the hero image for a journal post from available generated assets.

ADMIN.name: set_preference
ADMIN.description: Create or update a user preference key-value pair persisted to the user's profile.

ADMIN.name: set_theme
ADMIN.description: Change site aesthetic era.

ADMIN.name: submit_journal_review
ADMIN.description: Submit an editorial review for a journal post with approval or change-request decision.

ADMIN.name: update_journal_draft
ADMIN.description: Replace the content body of a journal post draft.

ADMIN.name: update_journal_metadata
ADMIN.description: Update journal post metadata fields such as title, description, tags, and category.

ADMIN.name: update_my_profile
ADMIN.description: Update the authenticated user's profile fields (name, credential).
